description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that runs every 3 days at 18:00, on push to tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a windows-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. Analyze C++ code using CodeQL, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, setting up the build environment, caching and setting up libraries, configuring and building the project with CMake, and then performing the CodeQL analysis.
